growth_records.strain: C-25 and C-15 (=Nm51); axenic, WHOI collection
growth_records.medium: HEPES-buffered artificial seawater medium + 1 mmol/L NH4Cl + trace elements
growth_records.cite: Bayer, Barbara et al. Carbon content, carbon fixation yield and dissolved organic carbon release from diverse marine nitrifiers. Limnology and Oceanography (2023). DOI:10.1002/lno.12252. [PMC10092583]
growth_records.snippet: marine ammonia-oxidizing bacteria (mean ± SD = 0.047 ± 0.010, n = 23) ... Nitrosomonas sp. C-15 C:N 4.31 ± 0.11, 145.7 ± 11.1 fgC/cell; Nitrosomonas marina C-25 C:N 4.38 ± 0.14, 302.4 ± 10.0 fgC/cell ... grown in HEPES-buffered artificial s
growth_records.notes: Prokaryotes (ammonia-oxidizing bacteria, Nitrosomonas C-15 & C-25 combined; both grown identically). DIC fixation yield reported only as AOB GROUP mean (0.047±0.010, n=23) in main text; per-strain yields are in Fig.1 only. Cellular C content & C:N per strain from Table 1 (this study). Uses CBB cycle. No mu/absolute biomass-specific rate. Confidence low because yield is group-level not strain-resolved in text.
